Save Recovery Seed Screen - Enter valid recovery seed and continue
Chat User B - Create Account
Chat User A - Send friend request again to User B
Settings Profile - Profile Picture - Crop Tool Modal elements
Pinned Messages - User can be redirected to the message when clicking on Go to message
Settings Audio - Assert screen texts for Echo Cancellation and Interface Sounds
Context Menu - Chat with Friend
Enter Username Screen - Cannot continue with empty value
